## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Enhancement (keeps the template minimal — see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Chore (deps, CI, formatting)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run docs:build` succeeds with no new warnings
- [ ] If Bicep changed: validated with `azd provision --preview` or `az deployment group what-if`
- [ ] If pages were renamed/added: updated the sidebar in `docs/.vitepress/config.mts`
- [ ] README / docs updated if user-facing behaviour changed
- [ ] Free tier still works without extra config
